flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center-Shreveport rose 25% between 2009 and 2012 ($20.0k → $25.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center-Shreveport fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (27 → 21).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center-Shreveport fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Louisiana State University Health Sciences Center-Shreveport are 60% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($74.7k vs $46.8k).
